case_title: LUONG LUU VS. BAY AREA DISPLAY SAN FRANCISCO,INC, CALIFORNIA COR

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUU, LUONG AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA DISPLAY SAN FRANCISCO,INC, CALIFORNIA COR PORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUU, LUONG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAY AREA DISPLAY SAN FRANCISCO,INC, CALIFORNIA COR PORATION $3,866.92 PRINCIPAL, $27.96 INTEREST, $135.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,030.18, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
